11. Do not wear red colour shoes or clothes.
12. Float red flOwers in river.
13. Do not apply kesattilakor sindOor on TueSday.
14. Give sindoor for 27 Tuesdays in a hoty place.
15. Do not walk bare foot on red floor.
16. Put 7 grains of wheat. 7 grains of m!ssoor dal, and red
stone with sindoor on it in a red cloth and throw it in the
running water on Tuesdays.
17. Do not give red coloured articles on Tuesday to your near
and dear ones.
18. Take medidne bath with Mars related medicines on Tuesday.
19. Use deer skin.
20. Distribute sweet tandoor chapattis.
